mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ENERGY_DATA (location, zone, power_kw, voltage, current_a, power_factor, energy_kwh, timestamp) VALUES (#{location}, #{zone}, #{powerKw}, #{voltage}, #{currentA}, #{powerFactor}, #{energyKwh}, #{timestamp})
mapper.select: SELECT id, location, zone, power_kw AS powerKw, voltage, current_a AS currentA, power_factor AS powerFactor, energy_kwh AS energyKwh, timestamp FROM ENERGY_DATA ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT id, location, zone, power_kw AS powerKw, voltage, current_a AS currentA, power_factor AS powerFactor, energy_kwh AS energyKwh, timestamp FROM ENERGY_DATA WHERE location = #{location} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT zone, location, ROUND(AVG(power_kw), 2) AS avgPowerKw, ROUND(MAX(energy_kwh), 2) AS totalEnergyKwh, COUNT(*) AS dataCount FROM ENERGY_DATA WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURDATE() GROUP BY zone, location ORDER BY avgPowerKw DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS hour, ROUND(AVG(power_kw), 2) AS avgPowerKw, ROUND(MAX(power_kw), 2) AS peakPowerKw, ROUND(AVG(power_factor), 3) AS avgPowerFactor FROM ENERGY_DATA WHERE timestamp >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') ORDER BY hour ASC

SELECT DATE(timestamp) AS day, ROUND(AVG(power_kw), 2) AS avgPowerKw, ROUND(MAX(power_kw), 2) AS peakPowerKw, ROUND(MAX(energy_kwh), 2) AS dailyEnergyKwh, ROUND(AVG(power_factor), 3) AS avgPowerFactor FROM ENERGY_DATA WHERE timestamp >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(timestamp) ORDER BY day ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMS_ALERT (alert_type, severity, message, location, threshold_value, current_value, is_resolved, timestamp) VALUES (#{alertType}, #{severity}, #{message}, #{location}, #{thresholdValue}, #{currentValue}, #{resolved}, #{timestamp})
mapper.select: SELECT id, alert_type AS alertType, severity, message, location, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, current_value AS currentValue, is_resolved AS resolved, timestamp FROM EMS_ALERT WHERE is_resolved = false ORDER BY FIELD(severity, 'CRITICAL', 'WARNING', 'INFO'), id DESC

SELECT id, alert_type AS alertType, severity, message, location, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, current_value AS currentValue, is_resolved AS resolved, timestamp FROM EMS_ALERT ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMS_THRESHOLD (threshold_type, location, threshold_value, updated_at) VALUES (#{thresholdType}, #{location}, #{thresholdValue}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}
mapper.select: SELECT id, threshold_type AS thresholdType, location, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM EMS_THRESHOLD WHERE threshold_type = #{thresholdType} AND (location = #{location} OR location IS NULL) ORDER BY location IS NULL ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, threshold_type AS thresholdType, location, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM EMS_THRESHOLD ORDER BY threshold_type, location
